channel.title: My Home page Site
channel.description: Recent content on My Home page Site

item.title: About me
item.description: Hi, I’m an easygoing-peaceful guy, I love nature, traveling and tech.

item.title: Blog test
item.description: Testing blog with a first post

item.title: Pain! pain!! pain!!!
item.description: successfully wired up hugo theme to my specific need. Some rework was necessary but not without the pain

item.title: First blog
item.description: Finally overcame my “Fear Of NOt Missing Out” (FONOMO) of having my own page

item.title: Home page
item.description: Finally, Welcome to my page (Still a WIP!) Finally overcame my “Fear Of NOt Missing Out” (FONOMO) of having my own page. I have created many personal webpage but never publish them, this is really a long time coming.
